project_name: AgentZZ Directed Studio Mode - Step 5 Redesign
design_philosophy: Cinematic Director's Cut. Organize the chaos of production into an elegant, prioritized showcase. Deep blacks, sharp 1px borders, high contrast. Tension between classic cinema (Serif) and digital utility (Mono/Sans).

scale.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tighter font-serif leading-none
scale.label: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-mono tracking-widest uppercase text-zinc-500

layout_strategy.global: Mobile-first stacked grid. Deep generous padding (`p-6` to `p-8`) inside containers to let content breathe. Avoid generic Bootstrap-style equal columns.
layout_strategy.pipeline_navigation: A minimalist 'timeline' track. Active step glows gold, completed steps are stark white, future steps are deep gray. Hide text labels on mobile, showing only current step. Avoid bulky pills.
layout_strategy.step_4_production: Sterile 'Control Room' grid tracking rendering progress per scene. Focus on data density, monospace time estimates, and clear status badges.
layout_strategy.step_5_result: A 'Deliverables Showcase' bento layout. 1. The Hero Card (O Filme Completo) takes full width at the top. 2. A dense grid for secondary products (Dublado, Narrado, Livros). 3. A horizontal cinematic scroll for individual scenes.

cards.base: relative backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border border-white/5 rounded-none sm:rounded-xl overflow-hidden group
cards.hero: border-gold/30 hover:border-gold/60 transition-colors duration-500. Large 16:9 media area with a dark gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent`).
cards.interactive: Hover state: subtle lift (`-translate-y-1`), inner border glow (`shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(201,168,76,0.05)]`).

buttons.primary_gold: bg-[#C9A84C] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 text-sm uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-sans
buttons.icon_floating: absolute bottom-4 right-4 h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white hover:border-gold hover:text-gold flex items-center justify-center transition-all z-10

status_indicators.done: flex items-center gap-2 text-emerald-400 before:content-[''] before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-emerald-400 before:shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]
status_indicators.processing: flex items-center gap-2 text-amber-400 animate-pulse before:content-[''] before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-amber-400 before:shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)]
status_indicators.error: flex items-center gap-2 text-red-400 before:content-[''] before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-red-400 before:shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(239,68,68,0.5)]

view_architecture.name: PipelineNavigation
view_architecture.purpose: Track progress across the 5 steps: Roteiro, Personagens, Storyboard, Produção, Resultado.
view_architecture.implementation: Render as a thin horizontal progress line (1px) connecting small nodes. Active node is gold, others white/gray. Below the active node, display the step name in `font-serif`.

view_architecture.name: ResultadoShowcase
view_architecture.purpose: The main Step 5 view. Transforms the flat list into a professional product handoff.
view_architecture.implementation: 1. Hero Section: 'O Filme Completo' - A 16:9 cinematic card with primary play/download actions. 2. Bento Grid: 2-column layout (on sm+) for 'Vídeo Narrado', 'Vídeo Dublado', 'Livro Animado', 'Storyboard PDF'. 3. Horizontal Scroll: 'Cenas Individuais' thumbnails mapped dynamically from the outputs array.

view_architecture.name: PostProductionDrawer
view_architecture.purpose: Panel for voice selection, music, localization, subtitles.
view_architecture.implementation: Use a Shadcn Sheet (bottom drawer on mobile, right side on desktop) or a minimal Accordion to hide these technical tweaks. Do not clutter the main deliverable showcase. Use a button like 'Ajustes de Pós-Produção' to trigger it.

micro_interactions.hover_image: Thumbnail images inside cards should scale up slightly (`scale-105`) with a smooth 500ms duration on parent group hover.
micro_interactions.loading_state: Replace standard spinners with a cinematic 'tracing line' (an animated 1px border) or a minimal data-loading text ticker (`[RENDERIZANDO...]`).

images.description: Cinematic dark studio photo. Use as a fallback poster for 'O Filme Completo' if no video thumbnail is available.
Moody, dark placeholder for individual scene video cards.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Force thin strokes (`strokeWidth={1.2}`) for a sharper, high-end feel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text has sufficient contrast against `#0A0A0A`. Hero thumbnails MUST have a bottom gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent`) so overlaid titles are readable.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="download-filme-completo"`, `data-testid="open-post-production-drawer"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Inject Google Fonts into the CSS file: `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');`
2. Update `tailwind.config.js` to map these fonts: `serif` -> Cormorant Garamond, `sans` -> Manrope, `mono` -> JetBrains Mono. Ensure gold accent `#C9A84C` is configured.
3. Restructure the `Resultado` (Step 5) component. Filter the `outputs` array. The item with `label === 'complete'` becomes the Hero Card. The remaining items become the 'Cenas Individuais' carousel.
4. Build the secondary products grid (Storyboard PDF, Livro Animado, Narrado, Dublado). Wire these to their respective routes (`/api/studio/projects/{id}/book/pdf`, `/book/{projectId}`).
5. Encapsulate the `PostProduction` component inside a Shadcn Sheet or Accordion to clean up the UI hierarchy.
6. Redesign the 5-step navigation bar at the top to look like a minimal timeline, replacing large pills with subtle nodes and a 1px connecting track.
